files.text:
FROM python:3.12.7-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
CMD ["python", "-m", "app"]

FROM python:3.12.7-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
USER root
CMD ["python", "-m", "app"]

FROM python:3.12.7-slim
RUN useradd --system --uid 1001 --create-home appuser
WORKDIR /app
COPY --chown=appuser:appuser . .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
USER appuser
CMD ["python", "-m", "app"]

FROM python:3.12.7-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
USER 1001
CMD ["python", "-m", "app"]
